name: DolEx Dollar Express
description_short: At 13519 Montfort Pl in Dallas, TX, DolEx Dollar Express offers quick check cashing during convenient weekday and weekend hours.
description_long:
DolEx Dollar Express is conveniently located at 13519 Montfort Place in Dallas, Texas, offering check-cashing services to the local community. This standalone check-cashing store in Dallas operates on a customer-friendly schedule: Monday through Friday 9AM-8PM, and Saturday-Sunday 9AM-2PM. Whether you're cashing payroll checks, government checks, or other forms of payment, this Dallas location provides accessible service during hours that fit working people's schedules.

This Dallas-area DolEx Dollar Express location specializes in quick and reliable check-cashing services. You can reach them at +1 800-481-1946 for questions about specific check types, fees, or to confirm hours before your visit. The team at this 13519 Montfort Place location in Dallas, TX is ready to help with your check-cashing needs without long waits.

For Dallas residents and anyone in the surrounding area, this DolEx location is a reliable alternative to banks and large chains when you need immediate access to your funds. Remember to bring a valid government-issued ID—you'll need it to cash any check. Stop by during convenient hours to handle your check-cashing needs at this accessible Dallas location.
pros: Extended weekday hours (9 AM - 8 PM) accommodate working schedules and after-hours financial needs
Established national presence with toll-free customer support line (800) 481-1946
Multiple weekend operating hours (9 AM - 2 PM, 3 PM - 8 PM) provide Saturday and Sunday access
Physical location in accessible Dallas area (East Grand Avenue) for walk-in transactions
Online presence at dolex.com suggests digital accessibility and business legitimacy
Convenient alternative for those without traditional bank accounts
cons: Website content does not disclose specific fee schedules or pricing for check-cashing services
Limited information available about service terms, identification requirements, or transaction limits
No transparency provided regarding check-clearing timeframes or hold policies
Physical location in single Dallas area limits accessibility for customers in other regions
Check-cashing services typically carry fees that may be higher than traditional banking alternatives
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional bank accounts
Working individuals needing after-hours access to check-cashing services
Customers requiring quick same-day access to funds from checks
People seeking money orders or wire transfer services outside normal banking hours
diagnosis: DolEx Dollar Express is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need accessible, extended-hours check-cashing and basic financial transaction services. The main caveat is that check-cashing services typically impose fees that may exceed traditional banking costs, so consumers with bank account access should evaluate whether standard banking alternatives would be more economical.
meta_description: DolEx Dollar Express at 13519 Montfort Pl, Dallas, TX. Quick check cashing and payment services.
